creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm aware of this update. However, it cannot be committed now because it will break dependent ports. Take py-sphinx for example.

% grep alabaster /usr/ports/textproc/py-sphinx/Makefile
                ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}alabaster>=0.7<0.8:textproc/py-alabaster@${PY_FLAVOR} \

I'd close this PR now and commit the update when it's available.
